title: Every Ore has a Use Resource Pack
description: The Resource Pack for "Every Ore has a Use"!
body:
# What is this Resource Pack?
Hey! This is the Resource Pack for my Datapack "Every Ore has a Use", a Datapack that adds more tools to the game! 

If you don't know how to apply a resource pack, here are the steps.
1. Download this (or any) resource pack after downloading the Datapack.
2. Open Minecraft (Java) and click on Options > Resource Packs
3. Click on Open Pack Folder
4. Drag the Resource Pack file to the folder
5. Your done!

# Link to the Datapack:
Datapack: [EOHAU Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/every-ore-has-a-use)
